description: Global Stress Matrix - tracks stock-market and bond-market stress worldwide. Scores 6 equity markets (US, Euro Area, UK, Japan, China, EM) and 4 bond markets (US Treasuries, US Credit, Intl Govt, EM Sovereign) 0-100 from drawdown, realized-vol percentile and trend; flags the worst. data/global-stress.json.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Global Stress Matrix - every 6h via EventBridge Scheduler, re-scoring equity and bond stress across global markets as price action updates.
